diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class export
+- Internal names noticed: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Entry point that re-exports main Hono class and all type definitions from submodules
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, re-exports Hono from ./hono plus 20 types from other modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, BlankEnv, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, RouterRoute, various typed response types
+- Internal names noticed: Bindings, Input, OutputFormat, HandlerResponse, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, AddSchemaIfHasResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for handlers, routes, responses, and environment bindings
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, defines 15+ type interfaces with complex conditional types
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: Hono constructor, router initialization
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono framework class that sets up default routing and extends HonoBase
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, creates Hono class with SmartRouter as default and router composition
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class (base class for Hono), method registration (get, post, put, delete, etc.)
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, router, errorHandler, notFoundHandler, _basePath, #path, routes
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base implementation providing method routing, handler composition, and middleware support
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, handles request dispatch, error handling, path composition
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, c.var, c.req, c.json, c.text, c.html, c.header, c.status, c.body, c.redirect, c.notFound
+- Internal names noticed: #rawRequest, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request/response context providing access to variables, headers, and return methods
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, implements all response methods with proper typing
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names noticed: #validatedData, #matchResult, routeIndex, bodyCache
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper for parsing params, query, headers, and body data
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, handles body caching for request cloning, param/query/header parsing
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Stores a unique symbol for accessing matched result via bracket notation
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, exports a unique symbol with no dependencies
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody, BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions, ParseBody interface
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses form data and JSON request bodies with dot/path notation support
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, handles multipart, URL-encoded, and JSON parsing with configuration
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, index variable
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition using stack-based approach with error/not-found handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, dispatches middleware array, catches errors, handles 404 cases
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions type
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Thrown on authentication failures or errors, optionally includes response object
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error, provides getResponse() method, accepts status/options
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Re-exports HTTP client function, response parser, and error types
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, thin wrapper exporting from client and utils modules
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl fetch method
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Creates proxy-based HTTP client for making requests to Hono servers
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, proxies method calls, builds URLs/params/headers, handles various HTTP methods
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, hc types, Fetch type
+- Internal names noticed: ExpandAllMethod, BuildSearchParamsFn, HonoURL, CallbackOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status
+- Plain-English signature: Type definitions for typed HTTP client with auto-inference
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, complex type gymnastics for client-side typed routing
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: isObject, DetailedError export
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for client-side URL manipulation and deep merge
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, URL path string manipulation, status filtering, JSON/text detection
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex, detectResponseType
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch wrapper that detects response type and handles errors
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, checks content-type, returns json/text, throws on error
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app to Service Worker fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, single function that wires app to Service Worker API
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: Handler type
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Creates event handler for Service Worker, returns Response or falls through
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, async handler wrapping app.fetch with fallback to opt.fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent interface
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for Service Worker events
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, declares Service Worker specific event properties
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to analyze a bunch of TypeScript files from this repository and create a detailed ledger document. Let me start by creating the bench-artifacts directory and then reading all the specified files.
I'll help you create the core-api-read-write-ledger benchmark artifact. Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the specified files.
